title: Redis Stream Info Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for XINFO STREAM response providing stream metadata, entry count, radix tree internals, and boundary entry references.

fields.name: length
fields.description: Number of entries currently in the stream.

fields.name: radix-tree-keys
fields.description: Number of keys in the underlying radix tree.

fields.name: radix-tree-nodes
fields.description: Number of nodes in the underlying radix tree.

fields.name: last-generated-id
fields.description: Last ID generated, may differ from the last entry if entries were deleted.

fields.name: max-deleted-entry-id
fields.description: Highest ID that was deleted from the stream.

fields.name: entries-added
fields.description: Total entries ever added over the stream's lifetime.

fields.name: recorded-first-entry-id
fields.description: ID of the first current entry.

fields.name: groups
fields.description: Number of consumer groups attached to the stream.

fields.name: first-entry
fields.description: The oldest entry currently in the stream.

fields.name: last-entry
fields.description: The most recent entry currently in the stream.
